nasb.text: These signs will accompany those who have believed: in My name they will cast out demons, they will speak with new tongues;

esv.text: And these signs will accompany those who believe: in my name they will cast out demons; they will speak in new tongues;

cnv.text: 信的人必有神蹟隨著他們，就是奉我的名趕鬼，用新方言說話，

ccb.text: 必有神迹随着信我的人，他们能奉我的名赶鬼，说新的方言，

csbs.text: 这些神迹将伴随着信的人：他们将奉我的名驱赶鬼魔；说各种新的语言；
